debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
    -- `midPart` is just the filter by the boolean predicate `¬isInitialCall ∧ ¬isFinalCall`
    have hmid :
        midPart =
          S.filter (fun c => (!isInitialCall m S c) && (!isFinalCall m S c)) := by
      ext c
      simp [midPart]
    -- `initPart`, `midPart`, `finalPart` form a partition of `S`
    have hpart :
        initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length = S.length := by
      have :
          initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length =
            (S.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c)).length +
            (S.filter (fun c => (!isInitialCall m S c) && (!isFinalCall m S c))).length +
            (S.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c)).length := by
        simp [initPart, finalPart, hmid]
      rw [this]
      simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
        (List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (l := S)
          (p := fun c => isInitialCall m S c) |>.trans
          (by
            have :
                (S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall m S c)).length =
                  (S.filter (fun c => (!isInitialCall m S c) && (!isFinalCall m S c))).length +
                  (S.filter (fun c => (!isInitialCall m S c) && (isFinalCall m S c))).length := by
              simpa [Bool.and_assoc, Bool.and_left_comm, Bool.and_comm, Bool.not_eq_true] using
                (List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (l := S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall m S c))
                  (p := fun c => isFinalCall m S c))
            -- simplify the last summand
            have :
                (S.filter (fun c => (!isInitialCall m S c) && (isFinalCall m S c))).length =
                  (S.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c)).length := by
              apply congrArg List.length
              ext c
              by_cases hI : isInitialCall m S c = true <;> by_cases hF : isFinalCall m S c = true <;>
                simp [hI, hF]
            -- finish
            omega))
    omega
